dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I checked out the place where you woke up, Master.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: The building was newly built and purchased only recently.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: It seems as though the owner of the building is someone who does not exist.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I believe that this person wanted to remain anonymous and purchased the building for a specific purpose.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: The only thing that stood out was the coffin you were in.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: No one should have known that you were in a slumber in there. Since you chose the holy site of your slumber right before you entered it, none of 'them' could have been related to this situation from the very beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: However, it would be an entirely different matter if even one of them was involved.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: They must have gone through many changes during my slumber.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: They have all grown much larger and more secretive.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: But the faction that has changed the most is that of the humans.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Though they were once the weakest, they now seem to be stronger than all others.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: The faction that has always been overshadowed by the others, have overcome their limits numerous times.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: And since they are systematically incorporated into society itself, their influence is quite impressive.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Humans have always been the fastest to change and adapt.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I did not return to that place after you disappeared, and so I am unfamiliar with the details of their development.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: However, since you are awake, I will now begin keeping a closer eye on their movements.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I also plan to get to the bottom of this incident as well.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Master has not changed, not even that nonchalant attitude of his.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: How was class?

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: It was a new experience.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I am glad it didn't seem to be too bad for you.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Frankenstein.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: It seems I have a problem with my power.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Co-could it be that you were asleep for too long after all?

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Master can connect with the minds of others. He may not understand foreign words immediately, but his ability allows him to understand what they mean and pick up other languages incredibly quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: A problem with that ability.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: It was in math class. Math.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: Complicated arithmetic and mathematical formulas. Not even connecting with other minds could help you learn those easily.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: But!

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: The Gatekeeper was the one teaching this math.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: How can I explain this to him?

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: I am truly impressed with the Gatekeeper.

dialogue.speaker: Frankenstein
dialogue.line: From the moment I saw him, I knew he wasn't ordinary.

summary: Frankenstein reports to his Master about the mysterious circumstances of his awakening and the significant changes in the world, particularly the rise of humans. He also mentions a problem with his own power, which became apparent during a math class taught by the impressive Gatekeeper.
